'''Tiatha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="JKTCG2" /> [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> who lived on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Databank" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> Tiatha stole [[Tiatha's brother|his brother's]] [[Ion blaster/Legends|ion blaster]], a family heirloom, to use as his personal weapon. After four seasons, the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] earned Tiatha enough wealth to retire.<ref name="JKTCG2" /> Tiatha was a legendary [[Scavenger/Legends|scavenger]] of rare quality. Very few of his fellow scavengers could match his talent for turning an old [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] husk into a "veritable [[palace]]". Tiatha had [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> His equipment included a [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]] strapped diagonally across the chest of his [[Robe/Legends|robes]], above another bandolier worn as a [[Belt/Legends|belt]].<ref name="JKTCG2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tiatha was created for two cards in the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" /><ref name="JKTCG2" />
